headline: Sysco Declares Increase to Quarterly Dividend Payment
summary: HOUSTON, April 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.55 per share, representing a $0.01 increase from the prior quarterly dividend of $0.54 per share. The new dividend is payable for the first time on July 24, 2026, to common stockholders of record at the close of business on July 2, 2026. “The Board’s decision today to increase the dividend underscores Sysco's commitment to delivering consis

headline: MAMA Says a Fresh High Could Come Before Mid-Year
summary: Mama's Creations is a high-quality consumer staple growth story with widening margins and ample cash flow, on track to rally higher in 2026.
